title: 3G/4G PTA Auction
description: A landmark spectrum auction officially launched 3G and 4G services across major cellular networks, fundamentally changing national connectivity.

title: The Mobile Surge
description: Within a year of the auction, millions of new wireless subscribers bypassed traditional landlines entirely, sparking a mobile commerce boom.

title: First 5G Tests
description: Zong successfully conducted the very first 5G service tests in the country, signaling the next massive leap in wireless infrastructure.
